features: Soft Velvet Perfection – Ultra plush velvet powder puffs deliver a smooth finish while feeling gentle and cloud-soft on the skin.
Flawless Powder Application – These mini powder puffs are Ideal for loose, pressed, helping blur pores, fine lines, and set makeup evenly.
Heart-Shaped Precision Design – Cute heart shape and satin ribbon handle allow controlled application for under-eyes, nose, and full-face setting.
3-Piece Multi-Size Set – Includes three different sized pastel powder puffs for versatile use at home or on the go.
Reusable – Durable, easy-to-clean makeup puffs designed for daily use, travel, and professional-quality results.
